name: agent-dev
description: Developer-focused repo cleanup and simplification workflows.

interface.longDescription: Agent Dev packages developer maintenance workflows for ruthless but evidence-backed repo cleanup. It starts with YAGNI audits that identify stale docs, unused code, duplicate scripts, dead flags, speculative abstractions, and implementation drift.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Dev to find stale, unused, duplicated, speculative, or misleading repo surfaces.
